description: Open-ended / autoregulated target kinds (§5.10) — the set ends on a condition rather than a fixed number. Spec canon plus a few common autoregulation variants.

tokens.label: To Technical Failure
tokens.description: Stop when form breaks down (before absolute failure).

tokens.label: To RPE
tokens.description: Continue until a target RPE (value parameterizes, e.g. 8).

tokens.label: Work Up To
tokens.description: Ramp to a target (e.g. work up to a heavy single).

tokens.label: To Breath
tokens.description: Driven by a breath pattern/hold (pairs with phasePattern, §5.15).

tokens.label: To Pain
tokens.description: Continue to the onset of pain/discomfort (rehab); value MAY parameterize a pain scale.

tokens.label: Negative Split
tokens.description: Second half faster than the first (endurance pacing intent).
